summary: M1 all 9 checks passed (fidelity + completability + invariants + perturbation)

the bird falls under gravity (no input needed)
flapping Space sets player.vy negative (the deterministic flap response)
status stays 'playing' across the safe teach

completability.message: completability out of scope for non-terminal milestone 'M1' — the whole-game referenceSolution win-path is replayed on the terminal milestone (its required entities are later milestones' deliverables)

invariants.name: no duplicate systems or entity ids
